context.brief: Nasdaq is broadly constructive but one or more context signals are mildly cautious. Maintain positions; stay alert to further deterioration.

regime.desc: Normal risk-on market conditions. Credit stable, liquidity abundant.

total_risk.action: NORMAL -- Maintain standard positioning. All systemic layers benign.

crisis_stage.label: Normal
crisis_stage.desc: All systems normal. No systemic stress detected across credit transmission.

equity.label: Equity Structure
equity.desc: Early softness. MA positioning still constructive but momentum slowing.

breadth.label: Market Breadth
breadth.desc: Broad market breadth healthy. SPY holding MA200, tech rotation supportive.

credit.label: Credit Stress
credit.desc: Early HY spread widening. Private credit showing mild redemption pressure.

lev_loan.label: Leveraged Loans
lev_loan.desc: Leveraged loan market stable. LBO debt holding, BKLN/SRLN near highs.

liquidity.label: Liquidity
liquidity.desc: Liquidity conditions benign. DXY stable, HY/IG ratio healthy, VIX contained.

funding.label: Funding Stress
funding.desc: Early funding friction. VIX rising moderately, hedging demand ticking up.

macro.label: Macro / Defensive Rotation
macro.desc: Macro / Defensive constructive. XLF leading SPY, no XLU rotation, market above MA200.

shock.label: Shock Detector
shock.desc: No shock signals. VIX stable, PUT/CALL normal, QQQ/SPY rotation benign.

cross_asset.label: Cross-Asset
cross_asset.desc: Cross-asset stress building. Credit markets broadly weakening vs equities.

credit_spread.label: Credit Spreads
credit_spread.desc: Normal: HY OAS 2.86% | HY-IG 2.05% | FSI -0.65 | Put/Call 1.19. Spreads contained. HY OAS normal, FSI benign, no funding stress.

liquidity_shock.label: Liquidity Shock
liquidity_shock.desc: Liquidity conditions stable. No broad funding stress signals.

financial_stress.label: Financial Stress
financial_stress.desc: Early financial sector weakness. Monitor XLF/KRE vs SPY for further deterioration.

track_a.signal: No credit stress signal. Credit markets calm.

track_a_early.signal: Credit-sensitive proxies are softening before spread confirmation. Monitor Track A confirmation risk. Triggered: XLF/SPY, KRE/SPY.

track_c.signal: No exogenous shock signals. All Track C sensors within normal range.

master_signal.detail: [조기 전이 경보] Track A Early Soft Watch. 공개시장 proxy 약화 감지 (XLF/SPY, KRE/SPY). 아직 스프레드 확인은 아니므로 포지션은 유지하되, 추가 악화 시 Track A 전환 여부를 점검.

market_regime.regime_desc: Normal risk-on market conditions. Credit stable, liquidity abundant.

risk_scenario.label: Risk-On / Expansion
risk_scenario.desc: 모든 지표 안정. 시장 구조 건강. 공격적 포지션 유효.
risk_scenario.action_hint: 표준 노출 유지. 모멘텀 전략 계속.

backtest.sell_rule: Sell TQQQ when Level >= 2 (MSS < 100, Warning zone)
backtest.buy_rule: Buy TQQQ when Level <= 0 (MSS >= 110, Normal zone)

methodology.score_description: MSS measures market structural health on a 100-baseline scale. 100 = neutral, above 100 = healthy, below 100 = deteriorating. Formula: MSS = 100 + TrendAdj + DepthAdj + VolAdj + DDAdj

score_components.name: TrendAdj
score_components.desc: Relationship of QQQ vs MA50 vs MA200. +8: QQQ>MA50>MA200 (Strong Bull). +4: QQQ>MA200 but <MA50 (Recovery). 0: QQQ within ±1% of MA200 (Neutral). -6: QQQ<MA200, MA50>MA200 (Early Bear). -12: QQQ<MA200, MA50<MA200 (Full Bear).

score_components.name: DDAdj
score_components.desc: Rolling 252-day peak-to-trough drawdown severity. 0: >-5%  -4: -5 to -10%  -8: -10 to -15%. -12: -15 to -20%  -16: <-20%.

score_zones.label: Overheat
score_zones.desc: Historically overbought; caution for new positions.

score_zones.label: Strong Bull
score_zones.desc: Strong trend, low volatility, shallow drawdown -- full exposure.

score_zones.label: Healthy Bull
score_zones.desc: Healthy structure with moderate risk -- remain invested.

score_zones.label: Neutral
score_zones.desc: Balanced environment; watch for further deterioration.

score_zones.label: Soft Risk
score_zones.desc: Mild signals emerging; reduce leveraged exposure.

score_zones.label: Risk Rising
score_zones.desc: Multiple risk signals elevated; defensive positioning advised.

event_types.desc: Extended period below MA200 with deep drawdown.
Long duration below MA200 without velocity shock.

methodology.disclaimer: MSS describes market structural health; it does NOT predict market tops or bottoms.
